name: LinkedIn Lead Engine
description: Generate consistent inbound leads using LinkedIn content and strategic outreach

automation.followUp: Follow up in 3 days if no reply

assets.title: Authority Hook Post
assets.content:
Most people think getting clients on LinkedIn requires a massive following.

They're wrong.

I've seen solopreneurs land $5k clients with fewer than 500 connections.

Here's the 3-step system:

1. Post content that solves ONE specific problem your ideal client has
2. Comment strategically on posts your ideal clients are already reading
3. Send connection requests with a value-first message (not a pitch)

The secret isn't volume. It's precision.

→ What's the #1 problem your ideal client is trying to solve right now?

Drop it in the comments — I'll give you a specific tip for your niche.

assets.title: Value / How-To Post
assets.content:
Here's my exact process for [YOUR SERVICE] in 5 steps:

Step 1: [Identify the core problem]
Most clients come to me struggling with [SPECIFIC PAIN POINT]. The first thing I do is...

Step 2: [Your diagnostic approach]
Before recommending anything, I ask these 3 questions:
- [Question 1]
- [Question 2]
- [Question 3]

Step 3: [Your method/framework]
This is where most [professionals in your field] get it wrong. Instead of [common approach], I...

Step 4: [Implementation]
The actual execution phase takes [timeframe]. During this time, clients typically see...

Step 5: [Results + maintenance]
Once [outcome is achieved], the key to maintaining it is...

This process has helped [X] clients achieve [specific result].

Want me to walk you through how this would apply to your business? DM me "SYSTEM" and I'll send you a free 10-minute audit.

assets.title: Personal Story Post
assets.content:
6 months ago, I almost quit.

[DESCRIBE YOUR LOW POINT — be specific and honest]

I was working 60-hour weeks, undercharging, and wondering if this whole solopreneur thing was a mistake.

Then I did one thing that changed everything:

[THE TURNING POINT — your key insight or decision]

Within [timeframe], [specific measurable result].

Here's what I learned:

1. [Lesson 1]
2. [Lesson 2]
3. [Lesson 3]

If you're in the [struggling phase] right now — keep going.

The thing that looks like failure is often just the last step before the breakthrough.

→ What's the hardest lesson your business has taught you? Share below.

assets.title: Quick Tips Post
assets.content:
5 things I wish someone had told me about [YOUR NICHE/SERVICE] earlier:

1. [Counterintuitive tip]
Everyone says [common advice]. The reality is [your truth].

2. [Time-saving tip]
Stop spending hours on [common time sink]. Instead, [faster approach].

3. [Mindset tip]
[Common belief] is holding most [your audience] back. The shift that changed everything for me:
[New perspective]

4. [Technical/tactical tip]
[Specific tactic] works 3x better than [what most people do].

5. [Relationship tip]
The fastest path to [desired outcome] isn't [what people think]. It's [actual answer].

Save this post for when you need it.

→ Which one hits home for you?

assets.title: Engagement Question Post
assets.content:
Quick question for [YOUR IDEAL CLIENT TYPE]:

What's your biggest challenge with [CORE PROBLEM YOU SOLVE] right now?

A) [Challenge option 1]
B) [Challenge option 2]
C) [Challenge option 3]
D) Something else (drop it in comments)

I'm asking because I'm putting together a [free resource/training/guide] specifically for [your audience] and I want to make sure it actually addresses what you're dealing with — not what I think you're dealing with.

Takes 10 seconds to answer. I read every reply.

(And yes, I'll share the results + what I'm building once I have enough responses.)

assets.title: Social Proof Post
assets.content:
[CLIENT NAME or 'A client'] came to me [timeframe] ago with a specific problem:

[DESCRIBE THEIR SITUATION — be specific]
- [Pain point 1]
- [Pain point 2]
- [What they had already tried]

Here's what we did:

First, we [Step 1 — your approach]
Then, [Step 2]
Finally, [Step 3]

The result after [timeframe]:
✓ [Specific measurable outcome 1]
✓ [Specific measurable outcome 2]
✓ [Qualitative win — how they feel now]

[Client quote: "Working with [your name] was... The biggest thing I got was..."
— [Client first name], [their role/industry]]

If you're dealing with [the problem you solved], I have [X] spots open this month.

DM me "[KEYWORD]" to see if we're a fit.

assets.title: Direct CTA Post
assets.content:
I'm opening 3 spots this month for [YOUR SERVICE].

This is for you if:
✓ You're a [ideal client description]
✓ You're struggling with [specific problem]
✓ You're ready to [desired outcome] without [common objection/obstacle]

This is NOT for you if:
✗ You're looking for [thing you don't offer]
✗ You want [unrealistic expectation]
✗ You're not ready to [commitment required]

What you get:
• [Deliverable 1]
• [Deliverable 2]
• [Deliverable 3]
• [Outcome/guarantee]

Investment: [Your price or "DM me for details"]
Timeline: [How long it takes]

To apply, DM me the word "[KEYWORD]" and answer these 2 questions:
1. What are you working on right now?
2. What's the #1 thing stopping you from [desired outcome]?

3 spots. First come, first qualified.

assets.title: Connection Request Message
assets.content:
Hi [First Name],

I came across your profile while looking at [mutual connection / shared group / their content].

I work with [your ideal client type] who want to [outcome you deliver] — noticed you're doing [something specific about their work].

Would love to connect and follow your work.

[Your name]

assets.title: Follow-Up After Connection
assets.content:
Hey [First Name], thanks for connecting!

I noticed [something specific from their profile/content — NOT generic]. [1 genuine observation or compliment.]

I put together a [free resource — checklist/guide/video] specifically for [their role/niche] on [topic relevant to them].

No pitch — just wanted to give back to people doing interesting work in this space.

Want me to send it over?

[Your name]

assets.title: Value-First Pitch Message
assets.content:
Hey [First Name],

Based on [something you know about them — their content, company, role], I'm guessing [specific challenge they're likely facing] is on your radar.

I recently helped [similar client type] solve exactly this by [your approach in one sentence]. They went from [before state] to [after state] in [timeframe].

I have a simple framework I use — happy to share it with you on a 15-minute call, no strings attached. You'd walk away with [specific value they get from the call].

Worth a quick chat?

[Your name]

assets.title: Lead Capture Form
Immediate Follow-Up (Same Day)
assets.content:
Subject: Here's your [resource], [First Name]

Hey [First Name],

Welcome! Your [resource] is attached/linked below.

[LINK OR ATTACHMENT]

Quick tip before you dive in: the section on [most valuable part] is where most people find their biggest "aha" moment. Start there.

One question while I have you:

What made you download this today? What's going on in your business right now?

Hit reply — I read every message and you might get a personalized tip in return.

Talk soon,
[Your name]

P.S. I'll be sending you [what comes next — a tip, a follow-up, etc.] in a few days. Keep an eye out.

assets.title: 3-Day Follow-Up
assets.content:
Subject: Did you get a chance to look at it?

Hey [First Name],

Just checking in — did you get a chance to go through the [resource]?

If you did, I'd love to know: what was your biggest takeaway?

If you haven't had time yet, no worries — here's the one thing I'd focus on first:

[YOUR #1 TIP OR KEY INSIGHT]

Also — I've been thinking about what you're probably dealing with if you downloaded this, and I put together a [short video / quick audit / checklist] that goes one level deeper.

Want me to send that over too?

[Your name]
